name: Clam Sauce (White)
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Minced, chopped or baby clams
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil.
2. Saute garlic for 1 minute.
3. Add clam juice and white wine; cook on low heat for 5 minutes.
4. Add clams, parsley, salt, and pepper to taste. Be careful with the salt, as clams have a lot of natural salt.
5. Pour over cooked thin spaghetti and serve immediately with a green salad and crusty bread.
